revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:大山上]]
'''Daisenjō''' (大山上) was a {{ill|Transition of Crown and Court Ranks|lt=Rank within the cap Rank system|ja|冠位|1=Transition of Crown and Court Ranks|lt=Crown Rank|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Transition of Crown and Court Ranks|13=User:Immanuelle/Transition of Crown and Court Ranks|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 冠位・位階制度の変遷|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 冠位・位階制度の変遷}} in Japan, used between {{ill|649|en|649|qid=Q31117|lt=649|1=649}} and {{ill|685|en|685|qid=Q33480|lt=685|1=685}}. Until {{ill|664|en|664|qid=Q30621|lt=664|1=664}}, it Ranked 11th out of 19 positions, placed above {{ill|Shōge|ja|小花下|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shōge|1=Shōhana-ge|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11463512}} and below {{ill|Ōge|ja|大山下|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōge|1=Daizan-ge|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11434579}}. After 664, it became the 13th Rank out of 26, positioned above Ōge and below {{ill|Ōkan-chū|ja|大山中|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōkan-chū|1=Daizan-chū|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11434580}}. == Overview == The Rank was established in {{ill|Taika (era)|en|Taika (era)|qid=Q1077930|lt=Taika|1=Taika (era)}} 5 (649) as part of the cap Rank system reform, which introduced 19 Ranks<ref>『日本書紀』大化5th year （649th year ）2月条。</ref>. It replaced the {{ill|Daisei|ja|大青|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Daisei|1=Daishō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11441821}} Rank from the previous 13-Rank system and was divided into two Ranks: Daisenjō and Ōge. In the 3rd year of Emperor Tenji (664), the cap Rank system was expanded to 26 Ranks, subdividing the Ōge Rank into three: Daisenjō, Ōkan-chū, and Ōge. The Rank was abolished on the 21st day of the 1st month in the 14th year of Emperor Tenmu (685) when a new naming system for Ranks was introduced. == Individuals Holding the Rank == The following individuals are noted in the {{ill|Nihon Shoki|en|Nihon Shoki|qid=Q813935|lt=Nihon Shoki|1=Nihon Shoki}} and other historical records as having held the Daisenjō Rank: * '''{{ill|Kamon no Tsunemaro|ja|掃部角麻呂|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kamon no Tsunemaro|1=Kanimori no Tsunumaro|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q60986224}}''': Mentioned in Taika 5 (649) as an envoy to Silla alongside {{ill|Miwa no Iro|ja|三輪色夫|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Miwa no Iro|1=Miwa no Shikobu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q65095810|1=Miwa no Shikobu}}. * '''{{ill|Abe no Kodono no Ogama|ja|安倍小殿小鎌|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Abe no Kodono no Ogama|1=Abenoote no Okama|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q85879359}}''': Active during Emperor Kōtoku’s reign, tasked with collecting {{ill|Cinnabar|en|Cinnabar|qid=Q104614|lt=cinnabar|1=Cinnabar}} in Iyo Province<ref>『続日本紀』天平神護元年（766th year ）3月3日条。</ref>. * '''{{ill|Mononobe no Kuma|ja|物部熊|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mononobe no Kuma|1=Mononobe no Kuma|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q55406945}}''' and '''{{ill|Mori no Ōishi|ja|守大石|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mori no Ōishi|1=Mori no Ōishi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11449996}}''': Led Baekje rescue forces under the command of General Abe no Hirafu in Saimei 7 (661). * '''{{ill|Naniwa no Ōgata|ja|難波大形|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Naniwa no Ōgata|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}''': Elevated to Shōkin-ka (小錦下) on the 7th day of the 1st month in Tenmu 10 (681). * '''{{ill|Nakatomi no Ōshima|ja|中臣大島|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nakatomi no Ōshima|1=Fujiwara no Ōshima|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q45830084}}''': Tasked in Tenmu 10 (681) with compiling imperial records and ancient histories. * '''{{ill|Toneri no Nokamushi|ja|舎人糠虫|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Toneri no Nokamushi|1=Toneri no Nokamushi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11613516}}''': Promoted to Shōkin-ka on the 9th day of the 1st month in Tenmu 11 (682). == Notes == {{reflist|qq=}} == Related Articles == * {{ill|Transition of the Cap and Rank System|ja|冠位・位階制度の変遷|1=Transition of Crown and Court Ranks|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Transition of the Cap and Rank System|13=User:Immanuelle/Transition of Crown and Court Ranks|qq=}}
{{translated page|ja|大山上|version=76169903|comment=Imported full ja history}}
[[ja:大山上]]
